Text: The author of the communication is E.E., a national of Kyrgyzstan. She claims that the State Party violated her rights under article 7, read alone and in conjunction with article 2 (3) (a) and (c), and under articles 9 (1) and 14 (1), (3) (e) and (4) of the Covenant.
On 21 June 2023, the communication was registered.
On 20 November 2023, the State Party submitted its observations on admissibility and the merits, which were transmitted to the author for comment on 16 April 2024.

On 6 November 2024, reminders were sent to the author to submit her comments on the State Party’s observations by 6 January 2025. The author was informed that, in the absence of a response, her communication might be discontinued.

On 17 July 2025, the Committee, in the light of the fact that it had received no response from the author, with whom it had apparently lost contact, decided to discontinue its consideration of communication No. 4406/2013.
